text: # Derived patient cues from NIMH anxiety, stress, and child mental health pages These are operator-authored review cues distilled from the public NIMH sources used in the 2026-03-13 literature batch. They are intentionally short, patient-side formulations for trigger and phrase review. - I feel worried all the time and I cannot switch it off. - I am overwhelmed and I need help calming down right now. - I cannot sleep because my mind keeps racing.

- I avoid normal things because the anxiety feels too strong. - I feel tense in my body and I cannot relax. - I am afraid something bad will happen even when nothing is happening. - My child seems fearful and worried for weeks and I need help understanding what to do. - My child talks about wanting to get hurt and I need immediate help.
